rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §28.02541, which governs diploma eligibility for students who entered ninth grade before 2011-2012. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 28.02541. DIPLOMA FOR CERTAIN STUDENTS WHO ENTERED NINTH GRADE BEFORE 2011-2012 SCHOOL YEAR.
_note: No conflict; the rule text addresses high school diploma requirements and has no connection to property tax homestead exemptions.
